transcript.clean_text: one kilometer to go as we head into the tom dumoulin bike park a big attack here by gregor mulberger from borah hands growing from the group of four that he's been with for the last couple of kilometers we've got max shackman from quick step floors who's ridden across to dylan van baal tim wellins and uh into the tom demouland park bike park brian it's pam flat as you can see 800 meters to go yeah it's phil gas now and millberger has done the right thing you can just see steve are asking for some help and he gets some help from a shackman so now it's up to shackman he needs to bring him back greg van avermaet has a goal behind as well to try and kind of limit losses but 500 meters to go milk burger has a small advantage can he hold out gregor mulberger from borah has grown 400 meters to go one more corner looks like he's gonna hang on to it but we've got a big effort here from quick step floors two riders now in this breakaway shackman and steibar but i think they've left it too late mall burger from borah handsgrown in the black and green heading up to the finish line in sitar helen the tom dumoulin bike park hosting this sixth stage of the big bang tour and arms in the air gregor mulberger takes stage six of the bing bank door tim wellins comes over for second and i think it was zenik steibar hangs on for third greg van avermaet and michael matthews just took a little bit of a gap from the chasing group there congratulations what a final you took everyone by surprise oh yeah thanks a lot it was also a surprise for me yeah the team worked pretty well today it wasn't the plan to go for me but yeah at the end it was i think 120 kilometers of pretty hard and hectic race and i was the lucky man at the end did you reckon disney this race uh no i didn't so they just told me it's a pretty tough one maybe the toughest uh stage in this big bank tour but yeah for me it was definitely the hardest so i'm pretty happy with the win it's my first uh world tour stage win and yeah we have to celebrate today how are you going to celebrate tonight we've uh at you
